race.description: Hawaii Five Oh @ Vinery Stud Hcp
race.comment: UNHINGED (2) showed good early speed on debut and hung out in the straight with an unlucky second over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Since fitted with a soft trial over 800m at Warwick Farm. Fitter now and expected to go close. TRON BOLT (4) stalked the speed on debut with a plugging third over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Maps well again and gets every chance with J Mac aboard. ROLLING HOME (5) hard fit for this fourth-up and will appreciate Nock's claim. Went back from the wide gate and closed well to run fourth over 1300m at Kembla Grange. Doesn't have to improve much to take a hand in the finish. RYE MANHATTAN (9) The Autumn Sun filly from Drinks All Round on debut for the Charlton yard. Has shown ability in the trials and must be kept safe.
